sentences.arabic: نَجَحَتْ سَلْمَى فِي الامْتِحَانِ بِدَرَجَاتٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Salma je položila ispit s visokim ocjenama.
sentences.translationEn: Salma passed the exam with high grades.

sentences.translation: Odmah je nazvala majku i rekla joj.
sentences.translationEn: She immediately called her mother and told her.

sentences.translation: Majka se obradovala i plakala od radosti.
sentences.translationEn: The mother was happy and cried from joy.

sentences.translation: Čestitala je Salmi i rekla «Ti si naš ponos».
sentences.translationEn: She congratulated Salma and said «You are our pride».
